text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "On semiamarts, amarts, and processes with finite value" by Ulrich Krengel and Louis Sucheston is a well-established 1978 work, consistently cited across numerous academic sources with matching title, authors, venue (*Probability on Banach Spaces*, Dekker), and pages (197–266). The automated database checkers likely missed it because it is a book chapter rather than a journal article.
LINK: https://drops.dagstuhl.de/entities/document/10.4230/LIPIcs.ESA.2018.57
